name: Hollow Warden Spells
desc: When you reach a Ranger level specified in the Hollow Warden Spells table, you thereafter always have the listed spell prepared.

| Ranger Level | Spells |
| --- | --- |
| 3 | Wrathful Smite |
| 5 | Alter Self |
| 9 | Phantom Steed |
| 13 | Dominate Beast |
| 17 | Steel Wind Strike |
